title: Lawyer Script & Story Comping
content:
Lawyer Script & Story Comping

I. Lawyer Call Script – 3 Versions (for Calls, Voicemails, or Emails)

1. Short (Elevator Style)
Hi, I’m seeking a probate attorney in Broward County. My partner recently passed and I’m dealing with estate fraud, funeral misconduct, and around $80k in question. I need someone experienced and open to contingency. Please call me at [your number]. Thanks.

2. Medium (Voicemail or Contact Form)
Hi, this is [Your Name]. My partner recently passed. We lived together for years and shared finances. I’m now dealing with funeral fraud and $80k in suspicious estate payments.
I need a probate attorney in Broward who handles fraud or contested cases. Contingency or hybrid payment preferred. Please call me back at [Your Number]. Thanks.

3. Full (Email or Online Inquiry)
Hello, My partner, Richard, recently passed. We shared a home and assets as life partners. Since his death, I’ve encountered red flags — including a suspicious $80k funeral payment, estate confusion, and possible fraud.
context: From document: Lawyer Script & Story Comping — chunk 1 (chunk 1/3)
